Sport|Olympics

Thecyclingaction will surely conjure plenty more memories and headlines as the 2024Olympicsofficially get underway in Paris this week.

The fast-paced, high-flying action on two wheels tends to be among the most gripping highlights of any Games, with more thrills and spills on the way at the Velodrome National de Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines, which is situated in Montigny-le-Bretonneux in the suburbs of the French capital.

But as ever it’s not just track cycling on offer, with road racing and time trials,mountain biking,BMXracing and freestyling all also on the Olympic agenda once again this summer.

Here is the full 2024 Olympics cycling schedule (all times BST)...
